lastReleaseMessage: Restore dates.ts after a botched regex replacement in the...

barRaise.topFinding: The commit the last three reports kept asking for landed: HEAD moved from 23d2e3d to 802b9aa (2026-06-11), closing the discord-notify em-dash MEDIUM (discord-notify.ps1:97 now matches the real U+2014) and bumping DESIGN.md to v0.4.1, which collapses the three-way milestone disagreement and flips the verdict to healthy. Two residues remain. The valuable test work is still uncommitted for a fourth report (schedule-fill.realistic.test.ts and schedule-e2e.test.ts, plus the write-dashboard-status.ps1 rewrite), and that rewrite now matters because committed HEAD still writes the dashboard to the renamed-away Scheduler.json while the live file is YaS.json, so the next release writes the wrong file and the dashboard goes stale. A rebrand to Yes& Scheduler also landed uncommitted across README and the SPA while DESIGN.md still reads the old name. One commit of the existing working tree plus two small edits closes all of it.
